story.text:
# Visualisations

The Game of 42 has four live views. These frames embed the running app — start it with `npm run preview` in `~/game42` (serves `https://42.agentprivacy.ai`); if a frame is blank, the app isn't running.

## Map — the plan + the editor
The 2D board: build each station, lock nodes into the run, share or join a game.

https://42.agentprivacy.ai/
HEIGHT 560
Map · the territory in plan

## Territory — the fold
The 3D board folding by the golden angle into a star tetrahedron as the game seals (drag to orbit, **F** to focus).

https://42.agentprivacy.ai/territory.html
HEIGHT 560
Territory · the living fold

## Constellation — all your games
42 games of 42 as one lit mosaic; toggle *light from grid* to light your assigned games within the six roots, and *core flow* for the duo share.

## Grid — compose a new 42
Assemble games + keys into one trust graph and assign them into a fresh constellation; *+ from wiki URL* pulls a game straight off a page here.

https://42.agentprivacy.ai/grid.html
HEIGHT 560
Grid · the plurality of self and other

---
[[Welcome]] · the Game of 42 — six axes × seven stations = 42
